common.findUsTitle: A short walk from the ocean

home.specialtiesSubtitle: Sushi cut to order, hand-folded dim sum, wok dishes seared over a fierce flame.
home.ambianceTitle: A dining room of ink frescoes
home.ambianceSubtitle: Ochre velvet, amber sconces, gilded mirrors.
home.universesSubtitle: Six families of dishes, six gestures.
home.universe1Text: Fish cut to order, warm vinegared rice.
home.universe2Text: Rolled on the mat, sliced at the last moment.
home.universe3Text: Folded by hand, steamed in bamboo.
home.universe4Text: Seared over a fierce flame, crisp and fragrant.
home.universe5Text: Charcoal-grilled, glazed with soy and mirin.
home.universe6Text: Ice-cream mochi, coconut pearls, black sesame.
home.universesCardTitle: The full menu, course by course
home.storyText: The Cantonese hand and Japanese precision, served in the same room.
home.ctaText: Lunch and dinner, Wednesday to Monday.
home.maisonText1: The sushi counter and the wok work side by side, never blurring.
home.maisonText2: A room like a setting: ink frescoes, ochre velvet, warm sconces.
home.point2Text: Dim sum shaped in the kitchen each morning.
home.famillesSubtitle: From steamed parcels to raw fish, each family has its gesture and its moment.
home.signaturesLead: Four dishes that sum up the house.
home.ambianceLead: Step inside: evening light settles on the frescoes and the meal begins.

about.historyIntro: In Soulac-sur-Mer, five minutes from the beach, Soulac Impérial serves southern China and Japan in a room of ink frescoes — never blending the two hands.
about.quote: Cooking without shortcuts: what must simmer simmers, what must be cut to order is cut to order.
about.motto: The produce first, the gesture second.
about.philosophyText1: Fish is worked to order, broths start in the morning, dumplings are folded by hand.
about.teamText1: A sushi chef at the counter, a wok chef in the kitchen, a floor team that knows the menu by heart.
about.commitment2Text: Broths, sauces, dumplings and desserts prepared on site.
about.commitment3Text: A calm room and all the time you need to choose.
about.historyText2: People come for a quick lunch after the beach as much as for a dinner that lingers, between ink frescoes and amber sconces.
about.philosophyText2: The menu stays deliberately readable: each family of dishes fits in a few lines, so you choose quickly and well.
about.teamText2: That continuity is what holds the same standard on a Tuesday in November and a Saturday in August.

menu.introText: Served at lunch and dinner. Prices in euros, service included.
menu.allergensText: Fish, shellfish, soy, gluten, sesame, nuts: please tell us about any allergy before ordering.
menu.serviceText: Last orders thirty minutes before closing.

gallery.title: Soulac Impérial in pictures
gallery.subtitle: The frescoes, the velvet, the laid tables.

contact.title: Coming to Soulac Impérial
contact.text: In the heart of Soulac-sur-Mer, a five-minute walk from the beach.

legal.photosText: Dining-room photographs taken on site. Dish and atmosphere photographs from royalty-free image libraries cleared for commercial use.

privacy.introText: Showcase site: no forms, no accounts, no online payment. We collect no personal data.
privacy.cookiesText: No advertising cookies or analytics trackers. Only your chosen language is stored in your browser.
privacy.thirdPartyText: The location map is provided by Google Maps, under its own privacy policy.
privacy.rightsText: Under the GDPR, write to us with any question about your data.

footer.tagline: Chinese and Japanese cuisine in Soulac-sur-Mer, five minutes from the ocean.
